fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order linked to this service item line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item number registered in the Service Item table.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service item group for this item.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number linked to this service item.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of this item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of this service item.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Repair Status Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the repair status of this service item.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service priority for this item.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated hours from order creation, to the time when the repair status of the item line changes from Initial, to In Process.

fields.name: Response Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated date when service should start on this service item line.

fields.name: Response Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated time when service should start on this service item.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when service on this item began and when the repair status changed to In process.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when service on this item began and when the repair status changed to In process.

fields.name: Finishing Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the finishing date of the service and when the repair status of this item changes to Finished.

fields.name: Finishing Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the finishing time of the service and when the repair status of this item changes to Finished.

fields.name: Service Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service shelf this item is stored on.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the spare parts warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the spare parts warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that warranty on either parts or labor exists for this item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of spare parts costs covered by the warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of labor costs covered by the warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the labor warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the labor warranty for this item.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract associated with the item or service on the line.

fields.name: Location of Service Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location of this item.

fields.name: Loaner No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the loaner that has been lent to the customer in the service order to replace this item.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor of this item.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

fields.name: Fault Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault reason code for the item.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price group associated with the item.

fields.name: Fault Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault area code for this item.

fields.name: Symptom Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the symptom code for this item.

fields.name: Fault Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault code for this item.

fields.name: Resolution Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the resolution code for this item.

fields.name: Fault Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a fault comment for this service item. For example, this can be information about what is wrong with the item or what service needs to be done.

fields.name: Resolution Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a resolution comment for this service item. For example, this can be information about the method that the technician uses to resolve the problem with the item.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Service Item Loaner Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a loaner comment for this service item.

fields.name: Actual Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the actual number of hours from the creation of the service order to the time when the repair status of this service item changes from Initial to In Process.
The program automatically calculates the contents of this field using the order date and order time values in the Service Header table and the Starting Date and Starting Time fields in the Service Item Line table.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the service document is a service order or service quote.

fields.name: Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the service price adjustment group code that applies to the current service item line. The program automatically copies the code from the Service Price Adjustment Group table.

fields.name: Adjustment Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the adjustment type for the line.

fields.name: Base Amount to Adjust
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that the service line, linked to this service item line, will be adjusted to.

fields.name: No. of Active/Finished Allocs
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of active or finished resource allocations for this service item.
The program automatically calculates and updates the contents of this field using the entries with an Active or Finished status in the Service Order Allocation table.

fields.name: No. of Allocations
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of resource allocations with the allocation status specified in the Allocation Status Filter field.

fields.name: No. of Previous Services
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of services performed on service items with the same item and serial number as this service item.

fields.name: Contract Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the contract line that you created.
If the service item line was created by the Create Contract Service Orders batch job, this is the reference line from the Service Contract Line table.
A service contract can have several contract lines. Assigning a number to each line makes it possible to differentiate between them.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ship-to code of the service item associated with the service contract or service order.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer number associated with the service contract.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Resource Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource filter.
If this field contains a particular resource number, fields such as the No. of Allocations field will only display information on service order allocations with that resource. The Service Tasks window will also show the service tasks corresponding to the service item lines that the specified resource is allocated to (provided that you use allocation in your company).

fields.name: Allocation Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a date filter.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates for a time period, fields such as the No. of Active/Finished Allocs display information for that time period only.

fields.name: Repair Status Code Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a repair status code filter.
If this field contains a repair status code, the Service Tasks window shows service item lines with that particular repair status only.

fields.name: Allocation Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains an allocation status filter. There are five options: Nonactive, Active, Finished, Canceled and Reallocation Needed.
For example, if this field contains the option Reallocation Needed, fields such as the No. of Allocations field only display information on service order allocations with that particular status.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the responsibility center that is associated either with the customer in the service order, or with your company.
The program copies the code automatically from the Responsibility Center field in the Service Header table.

fields.name: Service Order Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter that filters service order lines by service order number.

fields.name: Resource Group Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource group filter.
If this field contains a particular resource group number, fields such as the No. of Allocations field will only display information on service order allocations with that resource group. The Service Tasks window will also show the service tasks corresponding to the service item lines the specified resource group is allocated to (provided that you use allocation in your company).

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the value of Shortcut Dimension 1 defined in the Shortcut Dimension 1 Code field in the General Ledger Setup window.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the value of Shortcut Dimension 2 defined in the Shortcut Dimension 2 Code field in the General Ledger Setup window.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Release Status
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the status of a service item line. The options are the following:
Open

Released to Ship

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.
